name: Joseph Bowie
abstract: Joseph Bowie (born October 17, 1953) is an American jazz trombonist and vocalist. The brother of trumpeter Lester Bowie, Joseph is known for leading the jazz-punk group Defunkt and for membership in the Ethnic Heritage Ensemble.

about_quotes.speaker: Von Freeman
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] I was just talking with somebody. I was talking to Joe Bowie about that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Von Freeman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
